mapper.select: SELECT * FROM event_participant WHERE phone = #{phone} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM event_participant WHERE phone = #{phone} AND DATE(reg_date) = CURDATE() LIMIT 1
SELECT test_drive_time AS testDriveTime, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM event_participant WHERE DATE(reg_date) = CURDATE() AND test_drive_time != '시승 미신청' GROUP BY test_drive_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO event_participant ( entry_type, name, phone, email, shop_info, car_model, test_drive_time, qr_code_url, privacy_agree, third_party_agree, entrust_agree, mkt_agree, challenge_check_yn, drive_check_yn, gift_check_yn, reg_date ) VALUES ( #{entryType}, #{name}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{shopInfo}, #{carModel}, #{testDriveTime}, #{qrCodeUrl}, #{privacyAgree}, #{thirdPartyAgree}, #{entrustAgree}, #{mktAgree}, 'N', 'N', 'N', NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM event_participant WHERE DATE(reg_date) = CURDATE() AND test_drive_time = #{testDriveTime}
mapper.update:
UPDATE event_participant
email = #{vo.email}, shop_info = #{vo.shopInfo}, car_model = #{vo.carModel}, test_drive_time = #{vo.testDriveTime}, mkt_agree = #{vo.mktAgree},
reg_date = NOW()
WHERE seq = #{vo.seq}
